channel.title: Micrantha on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Micrantha on Home

item.title: Mobuild Envuscator and Digitalis
item.description: Why I built Mobuild Envuscator and Mobuild Digitalis: two tools aimed at the same mobile security problem from different sides.

item.title: Fortunes on Slack
item.description: A small Go microservice that serves classic Unix fortunes through an HTTP API and a Slack slash command.
